title: Skill transition display component with arrow indicator
purpose: Renders a visually distinct skill transition element with prominent skill name, optional description, and arrow indicator.
module_context: Exports a React functional component named SkillTransition that accepts skill name, description, and optional CSS class name as props.

steps.content: Render a flex container with blue background and border.
Display an arrow indicator on the left side with blue color.
Show the skill name in prominent bold text.
IF a description is provided, render it in smaller gray text below the skill name.
Apply additional CSS classes from the props to customize appearance.
